nodes.name: Eastern miombo sunbird
nodes.summary: The eastern miombo sunbird or miombo double-collared sunbird (Cinnyris manoensis) is a species of bird in the family Nectariniidae. It is found in central and eastern Africa. References External links Miombo double-collared sunbird - Species text in The Atlas of Southern African Birds.

nodes.name: Eastern miombo sunbird
nodes.summary: Eastern miombo sunbird（Cinnyris manoensis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Eastern miombo sunbird。

nodes.name: Cinnyris
nodes.summary: Cinnyris（Cinnyris）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联59种鸟类，如綠腹花蜜鳥、Western miombo sunbird、Eastern miombo sunbird等59种鸟类。
